0.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
0.bio: Dr. Sarah Chen is a board-certified Thoracic Oncology specialist at Mayo Clinic with 27 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Lung Cancer, recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

10000.raw_text: I was diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes (Newly Diagnosed) about 14 months ago. My care team recommended SGLT2 Inhibitors, and the overall journey has been manageable with good support. During treatment I experienced hypoglycemia, vision_blurring, neuropathy. My recovery took approximately 522 days. I'm still navigating the day-to-day challenges but making slow progress.

10001.raw_text: I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage III) about 26 months ago. My care team recommended Surgery, and the overall journey has been life-changing and ultimately rewarding. During treatment I experienced neuropathy. My recovery took approximately 379 days. I feel hopeful and grateful for the care I received.
